mapper.select:
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_2#Sql001 */ Q.BB_PRODUCT_CODE AS brandCode, Q.BB_PRODUCT_NAME AS brandName, Q.BB_PRODUCT_NAME || '(' || Q.BB_PRODUCT_CODE || ')' AS brand, Q.BB_STOCK AS unit, CASE WHEN Q.BB_UNIT_KBN = '1' THEN DECODE(Q.BB_STOCK,null,null,TO_CHAR(Q.BB_STOCK,'FM9,999,999,999')||'株') WHEN Q.BB_UNIT_KBN = '2' THEN DECODE(Q.BB_STOCK,null,null,TO_CHAR(Q.BB_STOCK,'FM9,999,999,999')||'円') WHEN Q.BB_UNIT_KBN = '3' THEN DECODE(Q.BB_STOCK,null,null,TO_CHAR(Q.BB_STOCK,'FM9,999,999,999')||'口') END AS applyUnit, Q.BB_LOT_DATE AS bbLotDate, DECODE(Q.BB_LOT_DATE,null,null,TO_CHAR(Q.BB_LOT_DATE,'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI')||'~') AS lotDate, Q.BB_GESTURE_VALUE AS issuePriceType, Q.BB_PRICE_FROM AS startPriceDisplay, Q.BB_PRICE_TO AS finishPriceDisplay, Q.BB_PRICE_CUT AS priceDisplayTick, Q.BB_DISCOUNT_FROM AS startDiscountRate, Q.BB_DISCOUNT_TO AS finishDiscountRate, Q.BB_DISCOUNT_CUT AS discountRateTick, Q.BB_STRIKE_PRICE AS marketOrderStrikePrice, Q.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM AS bookBuildingApplyPeriodFrom, Q.BB_PRESENTATION_TO AS bookBuildingPresentationTo, TO_CHAR(Q.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM,'YYYYMMDD') AS bookBuildingPresentationFrom, TO_CHAR(R.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM,'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') || '~' || TO_CHAR(R.BB_PRESENTATION_TO,'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS bookBuildingApplyPeriod, Q.BB_SETTLE_DATE AS deliveryDate, Q.BB_URGENT_STOP AS urgentStop, DECODE(Q.BB_UNIT_KBN,'1','株','2','円','3','口','株') AS sellBuyUnitType, Q.BB_IPO_PO_KBN AS ipoPoKbn, CASE WHEN Q.BB_STRIKE_PRICE = '0' AND Q.BB_GESTURE_VALUE = '1' THEN TO_CHAR(Q.BB_PRICE_FROM,'FM9,999,999,999') || '円' || '~' || TO_CHAR(Q.BB_PRICE_TO,'FM9,999,999,999') || '円' WHEN Q.BB_STRIKE_PRICE = '0' AND Q.BB_GESTURE_VALUE = '2' THEN 'ディスカウント率・' || RTRIM(TO_CHAR(Q.BB_DISCOUNT_FROM,'FM990.9999'),'.') || '%' || '~' || RTRIM(TO_CHAR(Q.BB_DISCOUNT_TO,'FM990.999'),'.') || '%' WHEN Q.BB_STRIKE_PRICE = '1' AND Q.BB_GESTURE_VALUE = '1' THEN 'ストライクプライス・' || TO_CHAR(Q.BB_PRICE_FROM,'FM9,999,999,999') || '円' || '~' || TO_CHAR(Q.BB_PRICE_TO,'FM9,999,999,999') || '円' WHEN Q.BB_STRIKE_PRICE = '1' AND Q.BB_GESTURE_VALUE = '2' THEN 'ディスカウント率・ストライクプライス・' || RTRIM(TO_CHAR(Q.BB_DISCOUNT_FROM,'FM990.9999'),'.') || '%' || '~' || RTRIM(TO_CHAR(Q.BB_DISCOUNT_TO,'FM990.999'),'.') || '%' END AS assumeCondition, R.EDELIV_ONLY_FLAG AS edelivOnlyFlag, R.CHANGE_BB_PERIOD_MSG AS periodUpdateMessage, R.CHANGE_PRICE_MSG priceUpdateMessage FROM BB_PRODUCT_MASTER Q LEFT JOIN M_IPO_PO_BB_PERIOD R ON Q.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = R.PRODUCT_CODE AND TO_CHAR(Q.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM,'YYYYMMDD') = R.PRESENTATION_FROM WHERE IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('yyyyMMddhh24mi') BETWEEN TO_CHAR(R.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, 'yyyyMMddhh24mi') AND TO_CHAR(R.BB_PRESENTATION_TO, 'yyyyMMddhh24mi')
AND Q.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = #{req.brandCode}

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_2#Sql003 */ A.BUTEN_CODE AS butenCode, A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER AS accountNumber, TRIM(A.UAI_QA_INVESTMENT_PLAN) AS investmentPolicyType, TRIM(A.UAI_OCCUPATION) AS professionType, TO_NUMBER(NVL(A.UAI_EXP_STOCK, 0)) || '年' AS stockSpotInvestExperienceYears, A.UAI_OFFICE_NAME AS officeName, A.UAI_QA_FINANCIAL_ASSETS AS financialAssetsType, A.CORPORATION_KBN AS corporationType, A.UAI_FAMILY_NAME_KANJI AS customerLastNameKanji, A.UAI_NAME_KANJI AS customerFirstNameKanji, A.UAI_FAMILY_NAME_KANA AS customerLastNameKana, A.UAI_NAME_KANA AS customerFirstNameKana, A.DEALER_NUMBER AS dealerNumber, A.NAME_KANJI AS customerNameKanji, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.OPEN_ACCT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS openAcctDate, A.TC_COMP_RANK AS complianceRank, C.EDELIV_AGREEMENT_KBN AS electronicDocConsentType, DECODE(C.EDELIV_AGREEMENT_KBN, 1, TO_CHAR(C.EDELIV_AGREEMENT_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') , '') AS consentDate FROM MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO A LEFT JOIN T_IPO_PO_EDELIV_AGRMNT C ON A.BUTEN_CODE = C.BUTEN_CODE AND A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = C.ACCOUNT_NUMBER WHERE A.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) AND A.UAI_ACCT_DEL_FLG = '0'

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_2#Sql004 */ NVL(I.MAX_SAIRYOU_ALLO, 10) - NVL(I.SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT, 0) - NVL(J.beforeTransferDiscretionAlloCount, 0) AS ableTimes, NVL(I.SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT, 0) AS discretionAlloCount, NVL(I.MAX_SAIRYOU_ALLO, 10) AS discretionAlloUpperLimit, NVL(J.beforeTransferDiscretionAlloCount, 0) AS beforeTransferDiscretionAlloCount, J.OLD_BRANCH_NO AS oldButen, J.OLD_ACCOUNT_NO AS oldAccountNumber FROM MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO H LEFT JOIN IPO_COUNT_MASTER I ON H.BUTEN_CODE = SUBSTR(I.BRANCH_NO, 1, 3) AND H.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(I.ACCOUNT_NO) AND TO_CHAR(I.ANNUAL,'YYYY') = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYY') - CASE WHEN IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('MM') < '04' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END LEFT JOIN ( SELECT F.BUTEN_CODE, F.ACCOUNT_NUMBER, F.OLD_BRANCH_NO, F.OLD_ACCOUNT_NO, NVL(G.SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT, 0) AS beforeTransferDiscretionAlloCount FROM ( SELECT D.BUTEN_CODE, D.ACCOUNT_NUMBER, E.OLD_BRANCH_NO, E.OLD_ACCOUNT_NO FROM MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO D INNER JOIN CALLCENTER.CHANGE_ACCOUNT E ON D.BUTEN_CODE = SUBSTR(E.NEW_BRANCH_NO, 1, 3) AND D.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(E.NEW_ACCOUNT_NO) WHERE D.BUTEN_CODE= #{req.butenCode} AND D.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) ) F LEFT JOIN IPO_COUNT_MASTER G ON F.OLD_BRANCH_NO = G.BRANCH_NO AND TO_NUMBER(F.OLD_ACCOUNT_NO) = TO_NUMBER(G.ACCOUNT_NO) AND TO_CHAR(G.ANNUAL,'YYYY') = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYY') - CASE WHEN IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('MM') < '04' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) J ON H.BUTEN_CODE = J.BUTEN_CODE AND H.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = J.ACCOUNT_NUMBER WHERE H.BUTEN_CODE= #{req.butenCode} AND H.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber})

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_2#Sql005 */ COUNT(*) AS count FROM BB_PRODUCT_MASTER K INNER JOIN SR_ACCEPT L ON K.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = L.BB_PRODUCT_CODE AND TO_CHAR(K.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, 'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(L.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM) AND L.BB_BRANCH_CODE = RPAD(#{req.butenCode}, 4, ' ') AND TO_NUMBER(L.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) WHERE K.BB_LOT = '0' AND K.BB_IPO_PO_KBN = '1'

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_2#Sql006 */ COUNT(*) AS count FROM BB_PRODUCT_MASTER M INNER JOIN SR_ACCEPT N ON M.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = N.BB_PRODUCT_CODE AND TO_CHAR(M.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, 'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(N.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM) AND N.BB_BRANCH_CODE = RPAD(#{req.oldButen}, 4, ' ') AND TO_NUMBER(N.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(#{req.oldAccountNumber}) WHERE M.BB_LOT = '0' AND M.BB_IPO_PO_KBN = '1'
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_2#Sql009 */ COUNT(*) AS count FROM BB_PRODUCT_MASTER S WHERE S.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = #{req.brandCode}

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_2#Sql010 */ COUNT(*) AS count FROM BB_ACCEPT T WHERE T.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = #{req.brandCode} AND T.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = TO_NUMBER(#{req.bookBuildingPresentationFrom}) AND T.BB_BRANCH_CODE = RPAD(#{req.butenCode}, 4, ' ') AND TO_NUMBER(T.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber})

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_2#Sql011 */ C.BB_PRODUCT_CODE AS brandCode, C.BB_PRODUCT_NAME || '（' || C.BB_PRODUCT_CODE || '）' AS brand FROM ( SELECT A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE, A.BB_PRODUCT_NAME, A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, NVL(B.PRESENTATION_DATE, TO_CHAR(A.BB_SETTLE_DATE)) FROM BB_PRODUCT_MASTER A LEFT JOIN M_IPO_PO_BB_PERIOD B ON A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = B.PRODUCT_CODE AND TO_CHAR(A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM,'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(B.PRESENTATION_FROM) WHERE NVL(B.PRESENTATION_DATE, TO_CHAR(A.BB_SETTLE_DATE)) >= IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD') AND IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('yyyyMMddhh24mi') BETWEEN TO_CHAR(B.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, 'yyyyMMddhh24mi') AND TO_CHAR(B.BB_PRESENTATION_TO, 'yyyyMMddhh24mi') AND A.BB_URGENT_STOP = '0' AND NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM STO_BOSYU_MASTER SBM WHERE A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = SBM.SBM_PRODUCT_CODE AND SBM.SBM_SYOHIN_TYPE = '21' ) ) C ORDER BY C.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM DESC,C.BB_PRODUCT_CODE ASC

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_2#Sql012 */ COUNT(*) AS count FROM SR_ACCEPT K WHERE K.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = #{req.brandCode} AND K.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = TO_NUMBER(#{req.bookBuildingPresentationFrom}) AND K.BB_BRANCH_CODE = RPAD(#{req.butenCode}, 4, ' ') AND TO_NUMBER(K.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber})

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_2#Sql013 */ L.BB_STOCK *NVL(M.MAX_ALLOCATION_UNITS,10) AS upperLimit FROM BB_PRODUCT_MASTER L LEFT JOIN BB_MAX_ALLOCATION_QUANTITY M ON L.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = M.BB_PRODUCT_CODE AND TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(L.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM,'YYYYMMDD') ) = M.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM WHERE L.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = #{req.brandCode} AND TO_CHAR(L.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM,'YYYYMMDD') = #{req.bookBuildingPresentationFrom}

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_2#Sql014 */ W.SECTION_ID AS sectionId, W.SECTION_NAME AS branchName FROM MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO U LEFT JOIN MEDIATE_CHARGE_INFO V ON U.BROKER_CODE = V.BROKER_CODE AND U.INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD = V.BROKER_CHARGE_CODE LEFT JOIN T_IPO_PO_SECTION_REF W ON U.BROKER_CODE = W.BROKER_CODE AND V.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE = W.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE WHERE U.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND U.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) AND ROWNUM = 1
